case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MARK ALLEN KAISER et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-17-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
